objective: Commit the remaining governance catch-up artifacts for Stampede issue #111 closeout evidence, Codex Fire fail-fast evidence, and duplicate wiki case-collision cleanup.
scope_boundary: Preserve the already-merged Stampede issue #111 closeout artifact, issue #469 fail-fast row, and #494 backlog Done evidence.
Remove the three duplicate graphify wiki case-collision files from git tracking.
Add only the issue-owned plan, execution scope, validation, closeout, and backlog evidence required to close issue #519.
out_of_scope: Changing Stampede application code or launchd service behavior.
Regenerating graphify or wiki artifacts beyond removing the duplicate tracked collision paths.
research_summary: Origin main already contains raw/closeouts/2026-04-21-stampede-issue-111-permanent-services.md, raw/fail-fast-log.md with the 2026-04-21 13:13 gpt-5.4 preflight timeout row, and the OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md Done entry for governance issue #494. The remaining #519 branch delta removes the tracked duplicate wiki paths that collide with canonical uppercase wiki pages on case-insensitive macOS filesystems.

sprints.name: Governance catch-up cleanup
sprints.goal: Close the remaining repository-tracking drift for issue #519.
tasks: Confirm the Stampede #111 closeout, fail-fast row, and #494 backlog entry are present on the branch.

acceptance_criteria: raw/fail-fast-log.md includes the 2026-04-21 13:13 gpt-5.4 preflight timeout row.
wiki/healthcareplatform/Training_assignments.md, wiki/hldpro/Repos_Ai_integration.md, and wiki/hldpro/Repos_Healthcare_platform.md are removed from git tracking.

specialist_reviews.focus: Separate already-merged catch-up evidence from remaining tracked wiki collision cleanup.
specialist_reviews.summary: The closeout, fail-fast row, and #494 backlog evidence are already tracked on origin/main; the issue branch should only add issue-owned governance evidence and remove the duplicate wiki paths.

alternate_model_review.summary: This slice is repository hygiene and evidence preservation only; no architecture, routing, or model policy behavior changes are introduced.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #519 may remove duplicate tracked wiki collision files and add the governance evidence artifacts needed to close the catch-up lane.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run validation, open the PR, wait for checks, merge under repository automerge rules, and close issue #519.

material_deviation_rules: If origin/main no longer contains the Stampede closeout, fail-fast row, or #494 backlog entry, update the issue branch to preserve that evidence before closing #519.
If graphify or hook-generated wiki changes appear beyond the three declared duplicate paths, stop and split them into a separate issue.
